case_title: LENDMARK FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC VS. MICHAEL T AQUINO

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-25-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
